name: request_security_action
description: Request execution of a security-related action in a controlled environment. IMPORTANT: Containers run in a macOS VM — raw-socket scans (nmap -sS, -sU, -O, arp-scan) will be REJECTED. Always use nmap -sT (TCP connect scan). See policies/platform_constraints.md.

target.description: IP, hostname, URL, or logical target name

tool.description: Tool to be executed (e.g. nmap, ffuf, custom python)

command.description: Exact command or script to execute. CONSTRAINT: Containers run in a macOS VM — use nmap -sT (not -sS), avoid -sU and -O. Raw-socket tools (arp-scan, hping, scapy) will not work. HTTP-based tools (ffuf, gobuster, sqlmap, curl) work fine.
